title: Tools To Pirate Hooks
description: Replaces Swords, Axes, Pickaxes, Shovels, and Hoes with Pirate Hooks!
body: Replaces all the main tools in the game with Pirate Hooks! Each different material featuring their own respective design. Live out your dream of Pillaging and Plundering across the 7 Seas with this pack! Also changes the fireball into a cannon-ball, so you better watch out for ghasts!
